de.uka.ilkd.key.util.pp

Class Printer

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.pp.Printer

  • class Printer
extends Object
    The intermediate layer of the pretty printing library. Using the block size information provided by the Layouter class, this decides where to insert line breaks. It tries to break as few blocks as possible.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private Backend back
      Back-end for the pretty-printed output
      private static int BREAK_MASK
      Mask for break type flags.
      private static int CONSISTENT
      Flag to indicate this block will be broken consistently
      private static int FITS
      Flag to indicate this block fits into the current line
      private static int INCONSISTENT
      Flag to indicate this block will be broken inconsistently
      private int lineWidth
      total line length available
      private ArrayList<Integer> marginStack
      stack to remember value of pos in nested blocks
      private int pos
      position in current line.
      private static String spaces
      a String containing SPACES spaces
      private static int SPACES
      how many spaces

    • Field Detail

      • BREAK_MASK

        private static final int BREAK_MASK
        Mask for break type flags. These flags are logically or-ed onto the margins in the marginStack to remember what happens with the block in question.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • FITS

        private static final int FITS
        Flag to indicate this block fits into the current line
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • CONSISTENT

        private static final int CONSISTENT
        Flag to indicate this block will be broken consistently
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

        private static final int INCONSISTENT
        Flag to indicate this block will be broken inconsistently
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

        total line length available

        how many spaces

        a String containing SPACES spaces

    • Constructor Detail

      • Printer

        Printer(Backend back)
        Create a printer. It will write its output to writer. Lines have a maximum width of lineWidth.

    • Method Detail

      • print

        void print(String s)
    throws IOException
        write the String s to out
        Throws:
        IOException

      • openBlock

        void openBlock(boolean consistent,
               int indent,
               int followingLength)
        begin a block

      • closeBlock

        void closeBlock()
        end a block

      • printBreak

        void printBreak(int width,
                int offset,
                int followingLength)
         throws IOException
        write a break. followingLength should be the space needed by the material up to the next corresponding closeBlock() or printBreak(), and is used to decide whether the current line is continues, or a new (indented) line is begun.
        Throws:
        IOException

        void mark(Object o)
